holdings.infoBox: GARY is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash stock at 8.74%, Applied Materials at 6.29%, ASML Holding at 5.60%, Lam Research at 5.26%, and KLA Corporation at 4.87%.

overview.description: The Mango Growth ETF (GARY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF focused on US large-cap growth companies. The issuer combines quantitative and fundamental criteria to select holdings GARY was launched on Dec 19, 2025 and is issued by Mango.
